commands.summary: Vendored RepoPact 1.6.0 validator (now with checkbox parity) passes on the ForgeLink tree.
Unified ForgeLink audit passes: RepoPact authoritative pass plus schema-ladder and link/last_verified; the local parity duplicate is removed.

environment.process_note: Re-vendored RepoPact 1.6.0: added the upstreamed checkbox-parity check to scripts/validate_repo.py (keeping the preflight extension), bumped pins to 1.6.0, and removed the now-redundant local parity check from .local/validate_system.py. Checkbox parity is now authoritative upstream (RepoPact decision 0014).
